'''kaganga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cedarwood|cedarwood]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-g-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cedarwood|cedarwood]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kaganga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kægængæth|kægængæth]] || [[word:kægængæj|kægængæj]] || [[word:kægængæsh|kægængæsh]] || [[word:kægængæ|kægængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kagagangath|kagagangath]] || [[word:kagagangaj|kagagangaj]] || [[word:kagagangash|kagagangash]] || [[word:kagaganga|kagaganga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kagangath|kagangath]] || [[word:kagangaj|kagangaj]] || [[word:kagangash|kagangash]] || [[word:kaganga|kaganga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kagafngath|kagafngath]] || [[word:kagafngaj|kagafngaj]] || [[word:kagafngash|kagafngash]] || [[word:kagafngaf|kagafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kagangatha|kagangatha]] || [[word:kagangaja|kagangaja]] || [[word:kagangasha|kagangasha]] || [[word:kagangaka|kagangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kagangath|kagangath]] || [[word:kagangaj|kagangaj]] || [[word:kagangash|kagangash]] || [[word:kaganga|kaganga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kagangathal|kagangathal]] || [[word:kagangajal|kagangajal]] || [[word:kagangashal|kagangashal]] || [[word:kagangakal|kagangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kagangathatha|kagangathatha]] || [[word:kagangajaja|kagangajaja]] || [[word:kagangashasha|kagangashasha]] || [[word:kagangaka|kagangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kagangathan|kagangathan]] || [[word:kagangajan|kagangajan]] || [[word:kagangashan|kagangashan]] || [[word:kagangakan|kagangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kagangathaoro|kagangathaoro]] || [[word:kagangajaoro|kagangajaoro]] || [[word:kagangashaoro|kagangashaoro]] || [[word:kagangakaoro|kagangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
